suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update to reflect Auth.js v5 JWT session strategy and multi-tenant schema with user_id columns in all tables
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Foundation milestone completed the auth schema setup with users, accounts, sessions, verification_tokens tables and added user_id to signals, alerts, trades, portfolio, agent_learnings

m1-auth-schema-setup.summary: Auth.js v5 setup with email/password + Google OAuth, multi-tenant DB schema with users table and user_id columns

m1-auth-session-multitenancy.summary: Session persistence, logout, and multi-tenant data isolation. All API routes check auth and scope by user_id

m1-landing-page-nav.summary: Public landing page for unauthenticated users, navigation component for authenticated users, all pages reachable via nav
